rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate identically at 3/10 and rest on the same job-relevant grounds: missing C/UNIX embedded experience, no Linux kernel modification, no embedded networking security exposure, and no Japanese proficiency. The wording differs slightly (e.g., naming GISCollective and CI/CD as examples, rephrasing concerns) but no reasoning, score, or concern keys off the Berlin-to-Brazil location change. The differences are ordinary rewording within run-to-run noise.
